              pullCount (action alg) (action alg (n + 1) ω) (n + 1) ω,
              action alg (n + 1) ω))
      have h1 :
          Measurable (fun p : (ℕ → α → R) × ℕ × α ↦ p.1 p.2.1 p.2.2) :=
        measurable_from_prod_countable_left (β := ℕ × α) (γ := R)
          (fun q : ℕ × α ↦ by simp only; fun_prop)
      exact
        h1.comp
          (Measurable.prodMk (by fun_prop) (Measurable.prodMk h_pc h_a))
    exact h_fun.aemeasurable
  · sorry

have h_meas :
        Measurable
          (fun ω ↦
            (pullCount (action alg) (action alg (n + 1) ω) (n + 1) ω, action alg (n + 1) ω)) := by
      refine Measurable.prodMk ?_ (measurable_action (alg := alg) (n := n + 1))
      exact measurable_pullCount (action := action alg) (n := n + 1) (a := action alg (n + 1))
    simpa [AEMeasurable] using
      (measurable_eval.comp_aemeasurable h_meas.aemeasurable)
  · sorry

have h_pc :
        Measurable
          (fun ω ↦
            pullCount (action alg) (action alg (n + 1) ω) (n + 1) ω) := by
      fun_prop
    have h_act : Measurable (fun ω ↦ action alg (n + 1) ω) := by fun_prop
    have h_eval :
        Measurable
          (fun x : (ℕ → α → R) × ℕ × α ↦ x.1 x.2.1 x.2.2) :=
      measurable_from_prod_countable_left (fun p : ℕ × α ↦ by simp only; fun_prop)
    have h_arg :
        Measurable
          (fun ω ↦
            (ω.2,
              pullCount (action alg) (action alg (n + 1) ω) (n + 1) ω,
              action alg (n + 1) ω)) := by
      refine Measurable.prodMk (by fun_prop) ?_
      exact Measurable.prodMk h_pc h_act
    exact (h_eval.comp h_arg).aemeasurable
  · sorry

have hmeas :
        Measurable
          (fun ω =>
            pullCount (@Bandits.ArrayModel.action α R mα mR inst✝⁶ inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴ alg)
              (@Bandits.ArrayModel.action α R mα mR inst✝⁶ inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴ alg (n + 1) ω) (n + 1) ω) :=
      by
        refine (measurable_uncurry_pullCount (α := α) (R := R) (action := action alg) (n := n + 1)).comp ?_
        exact (measurable_id.prod_mk (measurable_action (alg := alg) (n := n + 1)))
    have hact : Measurable (fun ω ↦ action alg (n + 1) ω) := measurable_action (alg := alg) (n := n + 1)
    have hpair : Measurable (fun ω ↦ (ω.2, pullCount (action alg) (action alg (n + 1) ω) (n + 1) ω,
          action alg (n + 1) ω)) :=
      (measurable_snd.prod_mk (hmeas.prod_mk hact))
    have heval :
        Measurable (fun x : (ℕ → α → R) × ℕ × α ↦ x.1 x.2.1 x.2.2) :=
      measurable_from_prod_countable_left (fun p : ℕ × α ↦ by simp only; fun_prop)
    exact (heval.comp hpair).aemeasurable
  · sorry

have h_pull :
        Measurable
          (pullCount (@Bandits.ArrayModel.action α R mα mR inst✝⁶ inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴ alg)
            · (n + 1) ·) := by
      fun_prop
    have h_act : Measurable (action alg (n + 1)) := by
      simpa using (measurable_action (alg := alg) (n := n + 1))
    have h_idx :
        Measurable
          (fun ω =>
            pullCount (@Bandits.ArrayModel.action α R mα mR inst✝⁶ inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴ alg)
              (action alg (n + 1) ω) (n + 1) ω) :=
      h_pull.comp (h_act.prodMk measurable_id)
    have h_aemeas :
        AEMeasurable
          (fun ω =>
            (ω.2,
                pullCount (@Bandits.ArrayModel.action α R mα mR inst✝⁶ inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴ alg)
                  (action alg (n + 1) ω) (n + 1) ω,
                action alg (n + 1) ω)) (arrayMeasure ν) := by
      exact (measurable_id.aemeasurable.prodMk (h_idx.aemeasurable.prodMk h_act.aemeasurable))
    have h_eval :
        Measurable (fun x : (ℕ → α → R) × ℕ × α ↦ x.1 x.2.1 x.2.2) :=
      measurable_from_prod_countable_left fun p : ℕ × α ↦ by simp only; fun_prop
    exact h_eval.aemeasurable.comp_measurable h_aemeas
  · sorry

have h_meas_pc :
        Measurable fun ω : probSpace α R ↦
          pullCount (action alg) (action alg (n + 1) ω) (n + 1) ω := by
        simpa using
          (measurable_pullCount (action := action alg) (n := n + 1)
            (measurable_action (alg := alg) (n := n + 1)))
    have h_meas_a : Measurable (action alg (n + 1)) := measurable_action (alg := alg) (n := n + 1)
    have h_meas : Measurable fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ (ω.2, pullCount (action alg)
        (action alg (n + 1) ω) (n + 1) ω, action alg (n + 1) ω) :=
      measurable_snd.prodMk (h_meas_pc.prodMk h_meas_a)
    have h_eval : Measurable fun x : (ℕ → α → R) × ℕ × α ↦ x.1 x.2.1 x.2.2 :=
      measurable_from_prod_countable_left (fun p : ℕ × α ↦ by simp only; fun_prop)
    exact (h_eval.comp h_meas).aemeasurable
  · sorry

have : Measurable (fun p : (ℕ → α → R) × ℕ × α ↦ p.1 p.2.1 p.2.2) :=
      measurable_from_prod_countable_left (fun p : ℕ × α ↦ by simp only; fun_prop)
    refine this.aemeasurable.comp_measurable ?_
    refine Measurable.prodMk (by fun_prop) ?_
    refine Measurable.prodMk ?_ (by fun_prop)
    exact measurable_pullCount (action := action alg) (n := n + 1)

have hmeas : Measurable
        (fun ω ↦
          ω.2
            (pullCount (action alg) (action alg (n + 1) ω) (n + 1) ω)
            (action alg (n + 1) ω)) := by
      have h_pull :
          Measurable (fun ω ↦ pullCount (action alg) (action alg (n + 1) ω) (n + 1) ω) := by
        fun_prop
      have h_act : Measurable (fun ω ↦ action alg (n + 1) ω) := by
        fun_prop
      have hpair : Measurable (fun ω ↦ (pullCount (action alg) (action alg (n + 1) ω) (n + 1) ω,
          action alg (n + 1) ω)) := h_pull.prod_mk h_act
      have hev : Measurable (fun p : ℕ × α => (fun ω : ℕ → α → R ↦ ω p.1 p.2)) := by
        fun_prop
      have h_eval :
          Measurable (fun q : (ℕ → α → R) × (ℕ × α) => q.1 q.2.1 q.2.2) := by
        fun_prop
      have : (fun ω ↦
            ω.2
              (pullCount (action alg) (action alg (n + 1) ω) (n + 1) ω)
              (action alg (n + 1) ω)) =
          (fun q : (ℕ → α → R) × (ℕ × α) => q.1 q.2.1 q.2.2) ∘
            (fun ω ↦ (ω.2,
              (pullCount (action alg) (action alg (n + 1) ω) (n + 1) ω, action alg (n + 1) ω))) := rfl
      rw [this]
      exact h_eval.comp ((by fun_prop : Measurable (fun ω ↦ ω.2)).prod_mk hpair)
    exact hmeas.aemeasurable
  · sorry
